20:08-20:17.caption: The bluebonnets open around a flattened path. The wagon's hazard lights still tick somewhere behind the lens.

20:17-20:26.caption: The same path, narrower now. The petals lean back toward the highway as if listening for it.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: petals lean back toward the highway and the path behind narrows

20:08-20:17.caption: The left row runs in even ranks. Wind moves through it without a sound on the track.

20:17-20:26.caption: The left row has bent into an angle as deliberate as a clock hand. No footprints anywhere near it.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the row bends into a clock-hand angle that was not there

20:08-20:17.caption: The right row stands taller, crowding the path. Something came through here before the camera did.

20:17-20:26.caption: The flowers crowd into a second hand-angle, paired with the left row. The field is keeping time.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the flowers crowd into a second clock-hand angle

20:08-20:17.caption: Two lobes of blue divide this clearing. They look planted. Nothing out here was planted.

hotspots.label: Log the two-lobed bloom pattern

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: two dense lobes mark the first gate digit: 2.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: two dense lobes mark the first gate digit: 2.
hotspots.cluePrompt: the rounded patches of bluebonnet flowers

20:17-20:26.caption: The two lobes have rotated toward the road, a timepiece worked by nothing.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the two lobes rotate toward the road like a timepiece

hotspots.label: Log the two-lobed bloom pattern

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: two dense lobes mark the first gate digit: 2.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: two dense lobes mark the first gate digit: 2.
hotspots.cluePrompt: the rounded patches of bluebonnet flowers

20:08-20:17.caption: A diagonal trail cuts the bloom, seven paces long, ending at nothing.

hotspots.label: Log the seven-step bloom trail

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: seven stepped blooms mark the second gate digit: 7.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: seven stepped blooms mark the second gate digit: 7.

20:17-20:26.caption: The diagonal trail sits three feet from where the tape last left it. No footprints in between.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the diagonal trail has moved three feet without footprints

hotspots.label: Log the seven-step bloom trail

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: seven stepped blooms mark the second gate digit: 7.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: seven stepped blooms mark the second gate digit: 7.

20:08-20:17.caption: A single column of bluebonnets stands apart from the rest, straight as a fence post.

hotspots.label: Log the single bloom column

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: one tall bloom column marks the third gate digit: 1.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: one tall bloom column marks the third gate digit: 1.
hotspots.cluePrompt: the bluebonnet flower stalk in the center

20:17-20:26.caption: The column doubles in the tape shadow, holds for a frame, then settles back to one.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the single column doubles in the tape shadow then settles

hotspots.label: Log the single bloom column

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: one tall bloom column marks the third gate digit: 1.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: one tall bloom column marks the third gate digit: 1.
hotspots.cluePrompt: the bluebonnet flower stalk in the center

20:08-20:17.caption: Three crescents of bloom curl around a bare patch of caliche.

hotspots.label: Back to the single bloom column
Log the three-crescent bloom clock

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: three crescent clusters mark the fourth gate digit: 3.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: three crescent clusters mark the fourth gate digit: 3.
hotspots.cluePrompt: the pale bare ground in the middle of the flowers

20:17-20:26.caption: The crescents have turned to face inward, toward a gate the camera has not found yet.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the crescents face inward toward an unseen gate

hotspots.label: Back to the single bloom column
Log the three-crescent bloom clock

journal.text: BLOOM CLOCK: three crescent clusters mark the fourth gate digit: 3.

hotspots.caption: BLOOM CLOCK: three crescent clusters mark the fourth gate digit: 3.
hotspots.cluePrompt: the dirt circle surrounded by blue flowers

20:08-20:17.caption: A wire field gate, chained shut. The padlock wants four digits.

hotspots.label: Set the padlock to 2713

journal.text: FIELD GATE PADLOCK: 2713 opens the path toward the culvert.

hotspots.caption: FIELD GATE PADLOCK: 2713 opens the path toward the culvert.

20:17-20:26.caption: The gate stands closer than the field should allow. The padlock hangs level with the lens.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the gate is closer and the padlock hangs at eye level

hotspots.label: Set the padlock to 2713

journal.text: FIELD GATE PADLOCK: 2713 opens the path toward the culvert.

hotspots.caption: FIELD GATE PADLOCK: 2713 opens the path toward the culvert.

20:08-20:17.caption: A weathered tally board nailed to a post, ranch fashion. The marks read like a count of something.

hotspots.label: Read the composited gate tally

journal.text: GATE TALLY: II / VII / I / III = 2713.

hotspots.caption: GATE TALLY: II / VII / I / III = 2713.

20:17-20:26.caption: The board has tilted toward the padlock, the way a sign tilts toward whoever it is for.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the blank board tilts toward the padlock

hotspots.label: Read the composited gate tally

journal.text: GATE TALLY: II / VII / I / III = 2713.

hotspots.caption: GATE TALLY: II / VII / I / III = 2713.

20:08-20:17.caption: The flowers part toward a concrete culvert mouth under the highway. The dark inside it does not match the dusk.

20:17-20:26.caption: The culvert mouth breathes black through the flowers. The tape hiss drops a register.
20:17-20:26.wrongness: the culvert mouth breathes black through the flowers
